title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Testbook - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Testbook - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Testbook invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Testbook:
Testbook is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook!
